companies.name: Ethos

companies.name: Tessera Labs
companies.description: Tessera builds an AI-native system integrator platform for enterprise ERP transformations, starting with SAP ECC to S/4HANA migrations.

companies.name: Accolade
companies.description: Accolade is an on-demand healthcare concierge for employers, health plans and health systems. Accolade's team of compassionate, trusted professionals is supported by breakthrough science and technologies to guide people through the healthcare system in a deeply personalized manner. Accolade customers experience industry-leading engagement levels, satisfaction scores unseen in health care, better health outcomes, and substantial medical cost savings of more than 10-percent.

companies.name: Actifio
companies.description: Protection and Availability Storage platform company, offering data management solutions to small to medium-sized businesses, large enterprises and managed service and cloud service providers.

companies.name: ActionIQ
companies.description: ActionIQ helps companies like Verizon Wireless, Michael Kors, Weight Watchers and HBC/Saks 5th Ave leverage 100x more customer data to develop unique, personalized experiences. As customer data become one of the most valuable assets Enterprises can use to differentiate and compete, most CMOs are frustrated by how long it takes to leverage that asset to develop real-world customer interactions and experiences. ActionIQ can deliver value in months (versus years) and it can make Marketers significantly more self-sufficient and less dependent on IT for their success.

companies.name: Affirm
companies.description: Affirm is a next-generation consumer finance company providing shoppers with instant point-of-sale financing for online purchases. Started by PayPal co-founder Max Levchin, Affirm?s data-driven approach looks beyond a standard credit score to reach broader consumer populations. Affirm's transparent financing solutions empower shoppers to buy now and pay later in monthly installments and at reasonable interest rates. These features help to improve sales conversions, boost basket sizes, increase repeat purchase, and maximize customer happiness.

companies.name: Airbnb

companies.name: Akita Software

companies.name: Aktis Oncology

companies.name: Allset

Allset is a marketplace connecting restaurants and local diners. It provides restaurants with online ordering and contactless dining solutions with no high fees.

Customers use Allset for fast and easy pickup, discovery of local eats and coffee shops, and saving money. For local companies, we have Allset for Teams to provide employees with company-paid meals at restaurants.

companies.name: Amiato
companies.description: Amiato provides real-time analytics services to enable companies to make sense of data by unlocking silos and future-proofing.

companies.name: Apptio
companies.description: Apptio's on-demand IT Cost Transparency software is a comprehensive IT Financial Management solution, providing IT and Finance managers the insight, analytics and reporting to optimize the ROI of IT, improve IT operational performance and better communicate the value of IT to business leaders and executives.

companies.name: Arimo
companies.description: Arimo is an information technology company that specializes in the fields of big data, machine learning, business analytics, visualizations, and data intelligence. It harnesses the behaviors of machines, devices, customers, and other entities to provide the most accurate predictions utilizing Deep Learning.

companies.name: Asana
companies.description: Asana builds enterprise-level collaboration software. It's the shared task list for your team. The place to plan, organize and stay in sync on your efforts. It helps teams orchestrate their work, from small projects to strategic initiatives.

companies.name: Asserts
companies.description: Asserts is an Observability intelligence platform that transforms your Prometheus metrics into root cause insights by adding a layer of intelligence to your native Prometheus ecosystem. There is no need to move your data or incur additional data storage costs.

companies.name: Authy
companies.description:
Authy provides an API for developers to customize the user experience when adding two-factor authentication and multiple add-ons for apps.

Authy provides a two-factor authentication smartphone application for consumers, a 2FA Rest API for developers, and an authentication platform for enterprises. It enables every user, group, and organization to customize their settings and configure security rules through its platform. Authy achieves and maintains compliance with PCI, HIPAA, FIPS140, and other regulatory mandates worldwide. It offers protection for various apps, including Facebook, Gmail, Dropbox, or any account that supports Google Authenticator. Authy’s login verification options include a unique verification code, a text message, and a singular answer question that appears only on its users’ mobile device.

companies.name: Automatic
companies.description:
Automatic is a Smart Driving Assistant that can save you money on gas, remember where you parked, and even call for help in a crash.

Automatic's mission is to empower drivers with knowledge about themselves and their cars so they can be safer and drive smarter. Automatic believes that drivers should not have to buy a new car to have a better driving experience, and that the phone in their pocket can bring the future of driving to today's automobiles.

Automatic isbased in San Francisco, California, but its team comes from every corner of the world. The team obsesses about creating beautiful and well-engineered products that make a real difference in people's lives. Its members are big on ideas, low on ego, and love working together.

companies.name: Barefoot Networks
companies.description: Barefoot Networks creates programmable networking systems for massive scale data center markets.

Bebop is a new development platform that makes it easy to build and maintain enterprise applications.

Bebop has developed a platform that enables them to build enterprise applications. Furthermore, its users are capable of maintaining the applications developed.

companies.name: BeReal
companies.description: BeReal is building the first social network where people spontaneously share their real life. No filters. No followers. Just friends, sharing with each other. On BeReal, you discover your friends' real lives and get closer to them!

companies.name: BioAge Labs

companies.name: Blockspring
companies.description: Blockspring connects the tools you use everyday to web services. Blockspring is a place to create, share, and run functions and lets you build visualizations from the most innovative blocks developed by engineers within your organization, and from around the world.

companies.name: Boku
companies.description:
Boku is a global mobile payments network providing mobile-enhanced payments in e-commerce and at physical point-of-sale.

Boku Identity is the industry's end-to-end identity verification solution. By combining identity verification and authentication capabilities with the Boku Platform, which aggregates and harmonizes mobile network operator systems across 58 countries worldwide, Boku Identity helps global enterprises across multiple industries effectively reduceidentity fraud, drive conversions, ensure compliance, and deliver a superior customer experience. Boku Identity’s privacy-by-design and tokenized identity architecture enables these businesses to onboard and service their customers worldwide while maintaining security and preserving user privacy.

companies.name: Border0
companies.description: Border0's product helps engineers get easy & secure access to cloud resources (e.g., databases, SSH, and HTTP servers) without needing a VPN and using your existing SSO credentials.

companies.name: Box
companies.description:
Simple sharing
Box.net's online file storage makes it easy to securely share content as a link or a shared folder with anyone—inside or outside your company.
Full-featured collaboration
Create an online workspace where you can share project files, add comments, assign tasks, start discussions or create new content
Powerful discovery and access
Discover new content by viewing all the latest Box activity within your company or by searching the full text of all shared files with no extra investment

companies.name: Bracket Computing
companies.description:
Allows companies to have their own private cloud and the security/performance that comes with it, hosted within a public cloud environment.

At Bracket, we are re-imagining enterprise computing—not as an incremental extension of what is today, but as radical innovation moving beyond what currently is.

companies.name: Bromium
companies.description: A new desktop virtualization solution that runs on existing devices by creating micro-VMs; every time the user initiates a new transaction, they create a thin in-memory clone of a VM state; everything is isolated in its in full-OS container; does not require the install of a native hypervisor on top of the core OS; uVMs are designed to be ephemeral + garbage collected (although you can save a state if you like); solution is completely secure because all transactions run in a uVM and all read/writes to VM0 (your pristine OS state) need to be approved by policy or the user.

companies.name: Bump Technologies
companies.description: Company Overview: provides applications and API's that allows two phones to authenticate.

companies.name: BuzzFeed

Our technology detects what is trending on the web, and connects people in realtime with content of the moment. Our site is rapidly growing and reaches more than 60 million monthly unique visitors.

Caviar offers restaurants a delivery solution in just a few minutes without any infrastructure, logistical, oroperational costs.

companies.name: Cazena

Cazena was founded by former Netezza leaders with a mission to radically simplify and speed up access to big data, allowing much faster business outcomes at a fraction of the cost. Cazena is backed by Andreessen Horowitz and North Bridge Venture Partners.

We transform the data warehouse into a hub for marketing and business operations, empowering everyone to take action with trusted, actionable data.

companies.name: CipherCloud

Pravin was a co-founder and VP of Engineering at Arcsight (Now
HP).  CipherCloud provides award-winning cloud data encryption and tokenization solutions technology to protect sensitive data on the fly before it's sent to the
cloud.

companies.name: ClearStory Data
companies.description:
ClearStory Data provides solutions enabling business users to discover, analyze and consume data at scale from different data sources.

ClearStory Data's solution offers a new way for business users to easily discover, analyze and consume data at scale from corporate, web and premium data sources for combined and up-to-date insights. Data sources include relational databases, Hadoop, Web and social application interfaces, and third-party data providers. ClearStory Data'splatform modernizes data analysis by introducing a new user model for big data analysis. The platform simplifies access to disparate data sources, automatically manages data harmonization, and enables interactive analysis at scale. With ClearStory's solution, organizations can easily converge data from corporate and third-party sources to make business decisions faster and across distributed teams in ways never before possible.

companies.name: Coinbase
companies.description: Coinbase is a digital currency wallet and platform where merchants and consumers can transact with digital currencies like bitcoin, ethereum, and litecoin.

companies.name: DeepMap
companies.description: DeepMap is a start-up focusing on solving the high definition mapping problem in the self-driving car business.  We have top-tier engineers from most prominent universities and software companies and are backed by top-ranked VCs.

companies.name: Dollar Shave Club
companies.description: The company, backed by technology studio Science, Inc. http://science-inc.com/, delivers razors equipped with stainless steel blades, lubrication strips and a pivoting head. At launch, members will be able to choose from three signature razors—The Humble Twin: a standard two-blade razor ($1/month, plus s+h); The 4x: a four-blade razor perfect for men's or women's hair removal needs ($6/month, shipping included); The Executive: a state-of-the-art six-blade razor ($9/month, shipping included)

If we're successful, it will be one of the first major applications of digital currency for the regular user.
